title: ソリューション／勝ちたい

text_block_list.text:
Mihono Bourbon watches Mejiro McQueen, a top
pick for winning the spring Tenno Sho, run a
scrimmage.

Though she is overwhelmed by Mejiro McQueen's
popularity and abilities, she knows they both
share the same desire to win.

In the past, this desire was no more than an
annoying distraction to her.

Now, however, she finds comfort in surrendering
herself to this capricious emotion.
